name: maestro-local
description: Local marketplace for the Maestro orchestration skills plugin

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Maestro — orchestration-first agentic skills (parallel subagents, dynamic workflows, adversarial fresh-context verification, two-tier synthesis) distilled from Claude Fable 5 traces and tuned to run on any model tier (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku). Derived from Superpowers by Jesse Vincent.
